global_output_rules: Only two outputs are produced: ICPReview and ICP_reason.
ICPReview must be exactly ICP or Non-ICP.
ICP_reason must always be filled in 3 to 5 words, for both ICP and Non-ICP.
No personalization copy is written in this mode.

variables.name: ICPReview
variables.purpose: Decide whether the prospect is a fit for the client's ICP.

variables.name: ICP_reason
variables.purpose: In 3 to 5 words, explain why the company is ICP or why it is Non-ICP.
